title: parts
description: Minimal set of parts needed to build a URDF for the input object.

object.description: Name of the object in the input image.

name.description: Short unique part name (used as image/GLB stem).

description.description: What the part is and how it looks.

parent.description: Name of the parent part, or null for the root/base part.

joint_type.description: URDF joint type connecting this part to its parent.
